## Alibaba Cloud Ecs SDK for Python

## Requirements

- Python >= 3.7

## Installation

- **Install with pip**

Python SDK uses a common package management tool named `pip`. If pip is not installed, see the [pip user guide](https://pip.pypa.io/en/stable/installing/ "pip User Guide") to install pip.

```bash
# Install the alibabacloud_ecs20140526
pip install alibabacloud_ecs20140526
```

## Issues

[Opening an Issue](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-sdk/issues/new), Issues not conforming to the guidelines may be closed immediately.

## Usage

[Quick Examples](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-python-sdk/blob/master/docs/0-Usage-EN.md#quick-examples)

## Changelog

Detailed changes for each release are documented in the [release notes](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-python-sdk/blob/master/ecs-20140526/ChangeLog.md).

## References

- [Latest Release](https://github.com/aliyun/alibabacloud-sdk/tree/master/python)
